_comment: Edit any value below to update your site. No code changes needed.
heroSubline: Rare leaves, easy companions and curated 3 Wishes trios - chosen with care and delivered across Egypt.
deliveryNote: Delivered across Egypt - carefully boxed with care notes tucked in.
newsletterSubline: Care tips and first peek at new arrivals.

contact.note: Online only - no physical store, no pickup

orders._comment: Orders are emailed to the owner automatically through Web3Forms (web3formsAccessKey). The customer gets their own confirmation email through EmailJS (emailjs). whatsappNumber is used only for the Contact us link, never for orders.

emailjs._comment: Sends the customer a confirmation email (free, 200 per month). Fill these from your EmailJS account. If left empty, the customer confirmation email is skipped but everything else still works.

copyright: 2026 Jungle Genie · Online-only plant shop, Egypt
